toolInput:
{"description":"Explore API routes and auth patterns","prompt":"Explore the taskify project at /home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester. I need to understand:

1. All API route files in src/app/api/ — list every route.ts file
2. Which routes currently use withAuth (check imports and usage)
3. The content of src/auth/withAuth.ts to understand the middleware
4. The content of src/app/api/health/route.ts
5. The content of src/app/api/csrf-token/route.ts
6. The content of src/app/api/notes/route.ts (POST handler, especially line ~54)
7. The content of src/app/api/quizzes/[id]/attempts/route.ts
8. The content of src/app/api/quizzes/[id]/submit/route.ts
9. Any other route files not yet covered that exist in src/app/api/

For each route file, tell me:
- Does it use withAuth?
- If yes, what options (roles, optional)?
- If no, does it access user data?

Return a comprehensive summary.","subagent_type":"Explore"}
